channel.title: PM Skills — The Ledger
channel.description: The weekly digest of the open professional-skills library — new skills, releases, the Season, and the ecosystem. Written by the repo itself.

item.title: The Ledger — week 30, 2026
item.description:
> The week in the open library, written by the repo itself. 630 skills · [playground](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/) · [subscribe](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/feed.xml)
## 🆕 164 new skills
- **[Context Budget](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/context-budget.html)** — Plan a session's context window like the budget it is — what loads up front, what gets linked instead, what stays fetch-on-demand, and how to keep… - **[Context Crusher](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/context-crusher.html)** — Compress tool outputs, logs, and JSON before they enter the context window — structural compression via a deterministic stdlib script (schema +… - **[Repo Map](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/repo-map.html)** — Navigate a codebase by map instead of reading files wholesale — a deterministic stdlib script that emits the tree with line counts and top-level… - **[Token Cost](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/token-cost.html)** — Measure before optimizing — estimate token counts locally with stated heuristics, price them at your model's rates, and quantify before/after… - **[Token Diet](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/token-diet.html)** — Cut LLM output tokens 40–70% by stripping grammatical scaffolding while preserving every fact — telegraphic output modes, when they pay… - **[First Client Contract](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/first-client-contract.html)** — Put your first client agreement in writing — the eight clauses a simple service contract must have, in plain language a non-lawyer can use, with… - **[Quarterly Tax Rhythm](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/quarterly-tax-rhythm.html)** — Build the tax habit self-employment requires — the setaside percentage from day one, the quarterly calendar, the records that make filing boring… - **[Side Business Setup](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/side-business-setup.html)** — Set up a side business in the right order — the do-first sequence (separate money, basic terms, simple records) vs. - **[GitHub Repo Vitals](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/github-repo-vitals.html)** — Read a GitHub repository's vital signs with keyless curl — commit recency, release cadence, issue/PR responsivene

item.title: The Ledger — week 29, 2026
item.description:
> The week in the open library, written by the repo itself. 520 skills · [playground](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/) · [subscribe](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/feed.xml)
## 🆕 54 new skills
- **[Calendar Defrag](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/calendar-defrag.html)** — Defragment a work calendar through a tool-using agent — find the meeting debt, propose the consolidation, and (approval-gated) execute the moves. - **[Expense Filer](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/expense-filer.html)** — Turn a pile of receipts into a filed expense report through a tool-using agent — extraction, policy checks, and categorization done for you… - **[Form Filler Operator](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/form-filler-operator.html)** — Fill long web forms and applications through a computer-use agent — from a fact sheet you approve, field by field, with a full transcript and… - **[Inbox Zero Operator](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/inbox-zero-operator.html)** — Drive an email inbox to zero through a computer-use or tool-using agent — triage every message into act/delegate/defer/archive with drafts… - **[Subscription Auditor](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/subscription-auditor.html)** — Find the subscriptions you forgot you pay for — a tool-using agent audits statements and inboxes, prices the waste annually, and preps (never… - **[Acquirer Red Team](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/acquirer-red-team.html)** — Simulate the acquirer's diligence team hunting for reasons to cut your price — their internal red-flags memo with a price-chip estimate per finding. - **[Altitude Shifter](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/altitude-shifter.html)** — Re-pitch one piece of content for four audiences — the board, the engineers, a customer, a new hire — with a delta table showing what changed… - **[Benefits Decoder](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/benefits-decoder.html)** — Decode an employment benefits package into what it's actually worth and where the fine print bites. - **[Decision Forensics](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/skill/decision-forensics.html)** — Reconstruct the decision actually made in a messy Slack, email, or meeting thread into a proper de

item.title: PM Skills Weekly — Issue 28
item.description:
Your weekly minute on doing professional work with AI — one skill to master, a few to try, and the numbers.
## 🌟 Skill of the week: Git Troubleshooter Diagnose a tangled git situation and give the exact, safe commands to fix it. **→ [Run it free](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/?skill=git-troubleshooter)** · `git-troubleshooter` · ✅ 4/5
## 🔥 Fresh picks - **[GDPR Compliance](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/?skill=gdpr-compliance)** — Assess GDPR compliance and build the core records (ROPA, lawful basis, DSAR, DPIA triggers). - **[Headline Options](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/?skill=headline-options)** — Generate and pressure-test headline options across proven formulas. - **[Impact Report](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills/?skill=impact-report)** — Write a compelling nonprofit impact or annual report that shows donors what their money achieved.
## 📊 By the numbers **466** professional skills · **66** bundles · **28** eval-scored (avg 4.4/5).
---
### 🎙️ Show script (for TTS / the podcast) > Good morning — this is PM Skills Weekly, issue 28. This week's skill to master is **Git Troubleshooter**: diagnose a tangled git situation and give the exact, safe commands to fix it. If you only try one thing this week, make it that one. A few fresh picks worth a look: GDPR Compliance, Headline Options, Impact Report. The library now stands at 466 skills across 66 bundles, 28 of them eval-scored. Run any of them free in your browser — no signup. That's your minute. See you next week.
---
*Browse everything at [mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills](https://mohitagw15856.github.io/pm-claude-skills) · [subscribe / archive](README.md) · open-source (MIT).*
